languages.text: "На вашем месте я бы нашел способ разрушить или хотя бы повредить этот механизм. Торчать в этой ловушке до скончания жизни я не испытываю ни малейшего желания".

traits.locale_text: Драфт: Абеляр не хочет провести оставшееся ему время в ловушке, взрываем!

languages.text: "If I were you, I would find a way to destroy or at least damage this mechanism. I have no desire to be stuck in this trap for the rest of my days."
languages.original_text: "На вашем месте я бы нашел способ разрушить или хотя бы повредить этот механизм. Торчать в этой ловушке до скончания жизни я не испытываю ни малейшего желания".

traits.locale_text: "If I were you, I would find a way to destroy or at least damage this mechanism. I have no desire to be stuck in this trap for the rest of my days."
"If I were you, I would find a way to destroy or at least damage this mechanism. I have no desire to be stuck in this trap for the rest of my days."
"If I were you, I would find a way to destroy or at least damage this mechanism. I have no desire to be stuck in this trap for the rest of my days."

languages.text: “我要是您，就会想办法毁了这台装置，至少也得造成一些损坏。我可不想后半辈子都困在这个陷阱里。”
languages.original_text: "If I were you, I would find a way to destroy or at least damage this mechanism. I have no desire to be stuck in this trap for the rest of my days."

traits.locale_text: “我要是您，就会想办法毁了这台装置，至少也得造成一些损坏。我可不想后半辈子都困在这个陷阱里。”

languages.text: « À votre place, je chercherais un moyen de détruire ce mécanisme ou au moins de l'endommager. Je n'ai aucune envie de rester coincé dans ce piège jusqu'à la fin de mes jours. »
languages.original_text: "If I were you, I would find a way to destroy or at least damage this mechanism. I have no desire to be stuck in this trap for the rest of my days."

traits.locale_text: « À votre place, je chercherais un moyen de détruire ce mécanisme ou au moins de l'endommager. Je n'ai aucune envie de rester coincé dans ce piège jusqu'à la fin de mes jours. »

languages.text: "Ben olsam bu mekanizmayı yok etmenin ya da en azından zarar vermenin bir yolunu bulurdum. Hayatımın geri kalanında bu tuzağa tıkılıp kalmak istemem."
languages.original_text: "If I were you, I would find a way to destroy or at least damage this mechanism. I have no desire to be stuck in this trap for the rest of my days."

traits.locale_text: "Ben olsam bu mekanizmayı yok etmenin ya da en azından zarar vermenin bir yolunu bulurdum. Hayatımın geri kalanında bu tuzağa tıkılıp kalmak istemem."

languages.text: «En su lugar, encontraría el modo de destruir o al menos dañar este mecanismo. No tengo intención de pasar el resto de mi vida en esta trampa».
languages.original_text: "If I were you, I would find a way to destroy or at least damage this mechanism. I have no desire to be stuck in this trap for the rest of my days."

traits.locale_text: «En su lugar, encontraría el modo de destruir o al menos dañar este mecanismo. No tengo intención de pasar el resto de mi vida en esta trampa».

languages.text: "Ich würde an Eurer Stelle versuchen, diesen Mechanismus zu zerstören oder wenigstens zu beschädigen. Ich lege keinen Wert darauf, für den Rest meiner Tage in dieser Falle festzusitzen."
languages.original_text: "If I were you, I would find a way to destroy or at least damage this mechanism. I have no desire to be stuck in this trap for the rest of my days."

traits.locale_text: "Ich würde an Eurer Stelle versuchen, diesen Mechanismus zu zerstören oder wenigstens zu beschädigen. Ich lege keinen Wert darauf, für den Rest meiner Tage in dieser Falle festzusitzen."

languages.text: 「もし私があなたなら、この装置を破壊する方法、あるいは少なくとも損傷する方法を見つけるでしょう。私はこの罠に一生閉じ込められるという望みはありません。」
languages.original_text: "If I were you, I would find a way to destroy or at least damage this mechanism. I have no desire to be stuck in this trap for the rest of my days."

traits.locale_text: 「もし私があなたなら、この装置を破壊する方法、あるいは少なくとも損傷する方法を見つけるでしょう。私はこの罠に一生閉じ込められるという望みはありません。」
